command:
git commit -m t0016_literature_survey_dendritic_computation [research-papers]: Review existing corpus for dendritic-computation coverage

Synthesised by-topic findings from 20 t0002 papers (10 cited) covering
DSGC dendritic spikes, NMDA multiplicative gain, sub-10 um inhibition
scale, and quantitative anchors. Identified gaps for the internet
search: NMDA biophysics outside retina, plateau potentials, and
active-vs-passive ablation studies.
